## 🚀 Type of Change

- [ ] 🌟 New Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (`fix`)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] 🏗️ Chore (`chore`)

## 📋 Summary

_Briefly describe the purpose of this PR. What problem does it solve?_

## 🛠️ Technical Breakdown

- **Core Logic:** (e.g., Updated `TasksService` to handle X)
- **UI/Components:** (e.g., Added `NewModal.tsx`)
- **Database/Infra:** (e.g., Added `lead_time` attribute)

## 🛡️ Risk Assessment

- **Migrations:** Does this require a DB migration script?
- **Security:** Are there new permissions or RLS rules?
- **Impact:** What existing features might be affected?

## ✅ Verification

- [ ] I have updated relevant `spec/` or `docs/` files if needed.
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` locally.
- [ ] I have run `npm run test` locally.
- [ ] I have verified the UI on Mobile and Desktop.
